field_values.action_summary: A party of twenty Martian warriors on eight-legged mounts approaches. The leader threatens the protagonist with a forty-foot spear, creating an immediate life-or-death tension.
field_values.camera_intent: Low-angle shots emphasizing 15-foot height of martian_warriors; Wide shots showing cavalry scale and eight-legged mounts; Close-ups of forty-foot spears and radium rifles
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Proximity/positioning of eight-legged mounts relative to protagonist
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH003_SC003

## Production Intent
Establish the overwhelming physical presence and technological threat of the Martian cavalry. Use scale disparity between the 15-foot martian_warriors and the protagonist to drive a transition from dread to terror.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- martian_warriors (including Leader)

## Required Environments
- arizona_quartz_vein_basin (mossy floor, quartz outcroppings, incubator enclosure)

## Continuity Constraints
- Exact count of twenty martian_warriors
- Proximity/positioning of eight-legged mounts relative to protagonist
- Spear length: 40 feet
- Martian height: 15 feet

## Beat List
- BT001: Cavalry approach (Dread)
- BT002: The encirclement (Height emphasis)
- BT003: The leader's threat (Terror)
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
